nasb.text: behold, I will put a fleece of wool on the threshing floor. If there is dew on the fleece only, and it is dry on all the ground, then I will know that You will deliver Israel through me, as You have spoken.”

esv.text: behold, I am laying a fleece of wool on the threshing floor. If there is dew on the fleece alone, and it is dry on all the ground, then I shall know that you will save Israel by my hand, as you have said.”

cnv.text: 看哪，我要把一團新剪的羊毛放在禾場上；露水若是單單落在羊毛上，而全地都是乾的，我就知道你要照著你所說的，藉著我的手拯救以色列了。”

ccb.text: 求你给个凭据。我把一团羊毛放在麦场上，若明天早晨只是羊毛上有露水，地面却是干的，我就知道，如你所言，你要用我去拯救以色列人。”
